summary: Completed testing of Iteration 9 bugfixes: Banner import, image download, /api/uploads path, JWT_SECRET stability, import replace mode, and public menu labels. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns valid JWT token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - works with token (no 401 error, JWT_SECRET is now fixed)
Backend: PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items/{iid} - no 401 error (confirms JWT_SECRET stability)
Backend: HEAD /api/uploads/{filename} - images served correctly (200 response)
Backend: Local image URLs use /api/uploads/ prefix format
Backend: .data file parsing detects type=2 banners with images
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file?mode=replace - imports banners as is_banner=true
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-menu with mode=replace - deletes old data before import
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/download-images - returns immediately (background task)
Backend: Download images endpoint reports count of external images
Backend: GET /api/public/menu/{code} - returns labels array in response
Backend: Labels array contains id, name, color for each label
Frontend: Menu page loads with images displaying correctly
Frontend: Images load from /api/uploads/ path (verified natural width > 0)
Frontend: Import menu button visible
Frontend: Labels button (Ярлыки) visible and opens dialog
Frontend: Labels dialog shows existing labels (3 found: Хит, Сезонное, Выбор гостей)
Frontend: Label name input and color picker working
Frontend: Download images button correctly NOT visible when all images are local
Frontend: Client menu displays correctly with categories, items, and images
seed_data_creation: Test restaurants with TEST_ prefix were created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bugfixes verified working: 1) Banner import from .data files (type=2 items become is_banner=true), 2) Download images endpoint works as background task and was already used to download all external images for Ресторан Catch (formerly Мята Центральная), 3) /api/uploads/ path correctly serves images, 4) JWT_SECRET is fixed in .env (ecf63243...) so no more 401 errors, 5) Import mode=replace correctly deletes old menu before import, 6) Public menu /api/public/menu/{code} returns labels array. Restaurant names: 'Мята Спортивная' (local images), 'Ресторан Catch' (formerly Мята Центральная, images now local after download).

banner_import.fix: parse_lunchpad_data now creates pending_banners list for type=2 entries with images, attaches to next category

image_download.issue: Need to download external images to local server
image_download.status: ✓ Fixed and verified (all images for Ресторан Catch now local)

uploads_path.fix: Changed to /api/uploads/ mount and URL prefix

jwt_401_error.issue: Random 401 errors due to regenerating JWT_SECRET

import_replace_mode.issue: Import replace mode needed to delete existing data
import_replace_mode.fix: mode=replace deletes all categories and menu_items before import

public_menu_labels.issue: Labels not returned in public menu endpoint
